Add installation stakes for easy ground mounting. PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Signs for Lawn Advertising & Property Promotion

Custom yard signs are a versatile promotional tool most commonly displayed in front lawns for business advertising, political promotion, real estate showings, and yard sales. Lawn signs are perfect for so many different events because they're lightweight, easy to install, and inexpensive when compared to other signage options. They're also incredibly effective at sharing a quick message with passing cars and pedestrians.

Corrugated Plastic Material for Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Display

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet (the 96 in direction.) The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.

Full Color Digital Printing for Custom Yard Sign Graphics

Here at Banners.com, we want to make designing and displaying your yard sign easy. That's why we offer free online templates, an intuitive online designer and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to your order to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign.

Yard Sign Scoring & Large Format Handling

All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design.

Did we answer all your questions? If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Corrugated Plastic Material for Durable Yard Sign Construction

Our yard signs are constructed from premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material that delivers exceptional durability for outdoor lawn applications. This lightweight yet sturdy material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, providing structural integrity while remaining easy to handle and install.

The corrugated plastic construction offers several key advantages for yard sign applications:

  • Waterproof protection - Resists rain, snow, and moisture damage
  • Lightweight design - Easy to transport and install on lawn stakes
  • Impact resistant - Withstands wind and minor impacts without cracking
  • UV stable - Maintains structural integrity in direct sunlight
  • Temperature stable - Performs in both hot and cold weather conditions

The hollow flute design runs horizontally across standard 4' x 8' sheets, providing optimal strength for typical yard sign dimensions. This material accepts full-color digital printing on both single and double-sided applications.

For applications requiring exact dimensions, please contact our customer service team to discuss your specific requirements, as standard finishing includes a 1/8" trim on all sides.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Finishing Options for Lawn Installation

We offer several finishing options to ensure your yard signs meet your specific display requirements:

Edge Finishing Options

  • 1/2" White Margin - Clean white border around your design
  • Full Bleed Printing - Ink extends all the way to the edge of the sign

Printing Options

  • Single-Sided Printing - Graphics on one side, ideal for fence-mounted displays
  • Double-Sided Printing - Graphics on both sides for maximum visibility from all angles

Installation Accessories Available

  • H Stakes - Available for 10x15, 10x24, or 10x30 yard signs
  • Beefy Stakes - Heavy-duty wire stakes for windy conditions
  • 12" Black Zip Ties - For fence mounting applications
  • 36" White Zip Ties - For larger fence installations

All finishing options are designed to enhance the professional appearance and installation versatility of your custom yard signs.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We offer multiple production speeds to meet your timeline requirements for yard sign projects:

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fastest turnaround available for urgent yard sign needs. Perfect for last-minute political campaigns, immediate real estate listings, or emergency business promotions.

2 Business Days Express Production

Expedited production for time-sensitive yard sign projects. Ideal for upcoming events, grand openings, or seasonal promotions that need quick turnaround.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option, providing excellent balance between speed and cost for most yard sign applications.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Most economical production option for yard sign projects with flexible timelines. Perfect for advance planning of campaigns, events, or ongoing business advertising.

Production Time Notes:

  • Turnaround time begins after artwork approval and payment processing
  • Production times are business days (Monday-Friday)
  • Weekend and holiday orders begin production on the next business day
  • Large quantity orders may require additional production time

For specific timeline questions or rush orders, contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Payment & Ordering Options

We accept multiple payment methods to make ordering your custom yard signs convenient and secure:

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards - Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • PayPal - Secure online payment processing
  • Business Accounts - Net terms available for qualified businesses
  • Purchase Orders - Accepted from approved commercial accounts

Ordering Process

  1. Select your yard sign size and quantity
  2. Choose single or double-sided printing
  3. Upload your artwork or use our online design tools
  4. Add installation stakes or accessories if needed
  5. Review and approve your proof
  6. Complete payment and submit your order

Business Account Benefits

Commercial customers can apply for business accounts with benefits including:

  • Net 30 payment terms for approved accounts
  • Volume discounts on large orders
  • Dedicated account management
  • Streamlined reordering process

Contact our business sales team to discuss account setup and commercial pricing options.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Yard Sign Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options to ensure your yard signs arrive safely and on time:

General Shipping Guidelines

  • Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for standard shipping
  • Flat shipping available for oversized signs (additional charges apply)
  • All yard signs are packaged to prevent damage during transit
  • Tracking information provided for all shipments

Shipping Methods

Standard Ground Shipping: Most economical option for non-urgent orders

Expedited Shipping: 2-3 day delivery for faster arrival

Next Day Air: Overnight delivery for urgent yard sign needs

Freight Shipping: Available for large quantities or oversized signs

Shipping Maps

Transit times vary by destination. Use our shipping calculator during checkout to see estimated delivery dates and costs for your location.

Special Shipping Considerations

  • Stakes and accessories ship separately when ordered with signs
  • Multiple sign sizes may require separate shipments
  • Weather delays may affect delivery in extreme conditions
  • Commercial addresses typically receive faster delivery than residential

For specific shipping questions or special delivery requirements, contact our shipping department at 320-391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Lawn & Property Applications for Custom Yard Signs

Custom yard signs serve numerous applications across residential, commercial, and institutional properties:

Real Estate Applications

  • Property listings - Display contact information and property details
  • Open house announcements - Direct visitors to showing times
  • Sold notifications - Celebrate successful sales
  • Coming soon signs - Generate interest before official listing

Political Campaign Uses

  • Candidate promotion - Display names and office seeking
  • Issue advocacy - Promote ballot measures and initiatives
  • Election reminders - Encourage voter participation
  • Campaign events - Advertise rallies and meetings

Business Advertising

  • Service promotion - Landscaping, contracting, and home services
  • Grand openings - Announce new business locations
  • Sales events - Promote special offers and discounts
  • Directional signage - Guide customers to business locations

Community & Personal Events

  • Garage sales - Attract shoppers with dates and directions
  • Graduation celebrations - Honor student achievements
  • Birthday announcements - Celebrate milestone birthdays
  • Fundraising events - Promote charity drives and benefits

The versatility and affordability of corrugated plastic yard signs make them ideal for both temporary and semi-permanent outdoor advertising needs.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Printing

To ensure the highest quality results for your custom yard signs, please follow these artwork specifications:

File Format Requirements

  • Preferred formats: PDF, AI, EPS, PSD
  • Acceptable formats: JPG, PNG, TIFF
  • Resolution: Minimum 150 DPI at actual print size
  • Color mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction

Design Guidelines

  • Bleed area: Include 1/8" bleed on all sides for full-bleed designs
  • Safe zone: Keep important text and graphics 1/4" from edges
  • Text size: Minimum 12pt for readability from typical viewing distances
  • Font requirements: Embed or outline all fonts

Artwork Approval Process

  1. Upload your design - Submit files through our online system
  2. Proof generation - We create a digital proof for your review
  3. Review and approval - Check all text, colors, and layout carefully
  4. Production begins - Manufacturing starts after proof approval

Color Match Proof System

For critical color matching applications, we offer color match proofs to ensure your yard signs meet exact color specifications. This service is particularly valuable for:

  • Corporate brand colors
  • Political party colors
  • School or organization colors
  • Matching existing signage

Design Services Available

Don't have artwork ready? Our professional design team can create custom yard sign designs based on your specifications and requirements.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Yard Signs for Your Business or Event

Ready to create professional yard signs that get noticed? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to design, customize, and receive high-quality corrugated plastic yard signs for any application.

Three Simple Steps to Order Yard Signs Online

Option 1: Upload Your Print-Ready Design

  1. Choose your yard sign size and quantity
  2. Upload your print-ready artwork file
  3. Review your proof and place your order

Option 2: Use Our Professional Design Services

  1. Select your preferred yard sign size and specifications
  2. Upload reference images or logos from your computer
  3. Provide detailed design instructions for our team

Whether you're promoting a real estate listing, running a political campaign, advertising your business, or announcing a community event, our custom yard signs deliver the visibility and professional appearance you need to succeed.

Why choose Banners.com for your yard sign needs?

  • Premium 4mm corrugated plastic construction
  • Full-color digital printing with vibrant, long-lasting inks
  • Multiple production speeds from 1-5 business days
  • Professional design services available
  • Installation stakes and accessories available
  • Competitive pricing with volume discounts
  • Expert customer service and support

Start designing your custom yard signs today and see why thousands of customers trust Banners.com for their outdoor advertising needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Yard Signs

What are yard signs?

Yard signs are lightweight promotional signs typically made from corrugated plastic material, designed for temporary outdoor display on lawns, properties, and roadsides. They're commonly used for real estate advertising, political campaigns, business promotion, and event announcements. Our yard signs feature full-color digital printing on durable 4mm corrugated plastic that withstands outdoor weather conditions.

What material are your yard signs printed on?

Our yard signs are printed on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast). This material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, providing lightweight yet durable performance. The corrugated plastic is waterproof, UV-resistant, and maintains its structural integrity in various weather conditions, making it ideal for outdoor advertising applications.

What are the most common yard sign sizes?

The most popular yard sign sizes include 18" x 24", 24" x 18", and 12" x 18" for standard lawn displays. Larger sizes like 24" x 36" and 18" x 36" are common for roadside advertising and political campaigns. We also offer custom sizes to meet specific application requirements. Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping.

Can my yard signs be printed double-sided?

Yes, we offer both single-sided and double-sided printing options. Double-sided yard signs provide maximum visibility for applications where people will view the sign from both directions, such as corner lots or high-traffic areas. Both sides can feature the same design or completely different graphics depending on your needs.

Do you offer bulk pricing for yard signs?

Yes, we provide volume discounts for larger quantity orders. Bulk pricing is automatically calculated in our online ordering system based on your quantity selection. For very large orders or ongoing campaigns, contact our business sales team to discuss additional volume pricing options and business account benefits.

What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

We offer four production speeds: 1 business day (priority), 2 business days (express), 3 business days (standard), and 5 business days (saver). Turnaround time begins after artwork approval and payment processing are complete. Production times are calculated in business days (Monday-Friday), excluding weekends and holidays.

Do yard signs come with stakes, and can I order extras?

Yard signs do not automatically include stakes, but we offer several staking options as add-ons during checkout. Available options include H-stakes for various sign sizes, heavy-duty "beefy" stakes for windy conditions, and zip ties for fence mounting. You can order additional stakes separately if needed for multiple installations.

Can I display a yard sign without stakes?

Yes, yard signs can be displayed in several ways beyond ground stakes. Alternative installation methods include zip-tying to fences, mounting on posts or stands, attaching to building exteriors (where permitted), or using as handheld signs for events. The lightweight corrugated plastic construction makes yard signs versatile for various display applications.

Are yard signs weather-resistant, and how should I store them?

Our corrugated plastic yard signs are designed for outdoor use and resist rain, snow, and UV exposure. However, extreme weather conditions like severe storms or hail may cause damage. For long-term storage, keep signs in a dry location away from extreme temperatures. The material can become brittle in very cold conditions, so avoid flexing signs when temperatures are below freezing.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
